feed.title: RWAscope Weekly Brief
feed.subtitle: Weekly policy-to-market intelligence on tokenized real-world assets. HKUST Crypto-Fintech Lab.

entry.title: Weekly Brief · Week of 2026-05-06
entry.summary: Global RWA Intelligence Brief — Week of 13 May 2026
entry.content:
Global RWA Intelligence Brief — Week of 13 May 2026

  • HSBC and Anchorpoint Financial hold the first two HKD stablecoin licences under HK Cap. 656 (issued April 2026), establishing a regulated settlement layer for Hong Kong RWA infrastructure.
  • The US GENIUS Act (signed July 18, 2025) remains the defining stablecoin legislation globally; its 1:1 reserve and monthly attestation requirements are shaping issuer compliance playbooks across jurisdictions.
  • EU MiCA's full application to crypto-asset service providers since December 2024 has made it the primary comparative benchmark for regulators in HK, Singapore, and the UAE finalising their own frameworks.

AI-generated summary — verify against source.

View on RWAscope →
